c.d: Number of active users on the app, indicating potential reach and network size for making friends
Specific demographic or interest group the app is designed for (e.g., women, introverts, athletes)
Method used by app to foster connections: online chat, in-person meetups, shared interests, gaming, etc.
Whether the app focuses on local community connections or worldwide friendships
Features that help maintain friendships across distances, like live photo sharing, voice messages, or community events
Extent of privacy options such as limiting friend lists, controlling visibility, or no public newsfeeds
